metadata.description: Program management craft, codified as a Claude Code plugin. Skills for MECE, Pyramid, SCR, RAID, DMAIC, charters, decision memos, and post-mortems.

plugins.name: everything-program-management
plugins.description: ECC-structured agent harness for program managers — 12 skills, 4 agents, 8 commands, plus rules, schemas, and worked examples for the artifacts PMs build every week.
